def negative_python_perf_layer_profiling_benchmarking_load_test_without_realistic_payload_size():
    rule_id = "python_perf_layer_profiling_benchmarking_load_test_without_realistic_payload_size"
    family = "performance"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "Layer: Profiling and benchmarking. Flag performance tests that use tiny payloads despite rules targeting large-input behavior."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
